# iLuau — Canonical Docs

> iLuau is a local MCP plugin that lets the Codex AI agent control a live
> Roblox Studio session and interact with the selection, properties, attributes,
> tags, and instances, plus a chat panel embedded in Studio.

## Components

- `plugins/iluau/server/` — local MCP server (stdio) and HTTP dashboard/bridge
- `plugins/iluau/studio-plugin/iLuau.plugin.lua` — dockable Studio plugin
- `plugins/iluau/dashboard/` — local dashboard UI
- `plugins/iluau/skills/iluau-guide/` — usage guide for Codex

## Setup

1. Install Node.js 18 or higher.
2. From `plugins/iluau/`, run `npm install` if needed.
3. Configure Codex to launch the MCP server (stdio):
   `node /path/to/plugins/iluau/server/index.js`
4. Copy `studio-plugin/iLuau.plugin.lua` into the Roblox Studio plugins folder
   and restart Studio.
5. Enable Allow HTTP Requests in Studio so the plugin can reach the local
   bridge at `http://127.0.0.1:3099/`.

## Chat with Codex inside Studio

The Studio panel has a "Codex chat" card. Messages typed there go to the local
chat queue; Codex reads them with `iluau.chat_inbox`, acts using the other
iLuau tools, and replies with `iluau.chat_reply` so the answer appears back in
the panel.

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/diogo2806/iluau
- Issues: https://github.com/diogo2806/iluau/issues
